commit.subject: LU-19848 compat: move GDS support to lustre_compat/
commit.message:
LU-19848 compat: move GDS support to lustre_compat/

The upstream kernel can not depend upon an out-of-tree
driver. Hence, move the legacy GDS support to
lustre_compat/ in preparation for p2pdma support.

Test-Parameters: ignore
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I81573a06b42a5daa70691f93ba6fe89128d07103
